items.body:
**Naming convention violation – `bool` property must start with a verb prefix.**

Per the [Management Plane Naming Conventions](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/doc/dev/Mgmt-Naming-Conventions.md#general-guidelines), property or parameter names of type `bool` must start with a verb such as `Is`, `Can`, or `Has`.

Renaming `HasData` → `Data` removes the required verb prefix. Please keep the original name `HasData` (or use an alternative like `IsDataAvailable`).
One naming convention violation found: the `bool` property was renamed from `HasData` to `Data`, dropping the required verb prefix. See inline comment.
